content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in Vietnamese,Chefland has 222 different types of coconut, type AAA and type BBB. Type AAA contains only xax_axa‚Äã milliliters of coconut water and type BBB contains only xbx_bxb‚Äã grams of coconut pulp. Chef's nutritionist has advised him to consume XaX_aXa‚Äã milliliters of coconut water and XbX_bXb‚Äã grams of coconut pulp every week in the summer. Find the total number of coconuts (type AAA + type BBB) that Chef should buy each week to keep himself active in the hot weather.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains a single line of input, four integers xax_axa‚Äã, xbx_bxb‚Äã, XaX_aXa‚Äã, XbX_bXb‚Äã.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line the answer to the problem.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
TestCase 111:
Number of coconuts of Type AAA required = 1000100=10\frac{1000}{100} = 101001000‚Äã=10 and number of coconuts of Type BBB required = 1200400=3\frac{1200}{400} = 34001200‚Äã=3.  So the total number of coconuts required is 10+3=1310 + 3 = 1310+3=13.
TestCase 222:
Number of coconuts of Type AAA required = 1000100=10\frac{1000}{100} = 101001000‚Äã=10 and number of coconuts of Type BBB required = 1350450=3\frac{1350}{450} = 34501350‚Äã=3.  So the total number of coconuts required is 10+3=1310 + 3 = 1310+3=13.
TestCase 333:
Number of coconuts of Type AAA required = 1200150=8\frac{1200}{150} = 81501200‚Äã=8 and number of coconuts of Type BBB required = 1200400=3\frac{1200}{400} = 34001200‚Äã=3.  So the total number of coconuts required is 8+3=118 + 3 = 118+3=11.
